name: Lalamove Asia On-Demand Logistics API
what_it_does: Lalamove Asia on-demand logistics REST API for businesses to automate same-day and scheduled delivery booking, fleet dispatch, and real-time courier tracking across Hong Kong, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, Vietnam, Indonesia, India, and China — serving B2B merchants needing on-demand van, truck, and motorcycle delivery for e-commerce fulfillment, restaurant delivery, and business logistics. Enables AI agents to manage delivery quotation for cost estimation automation, handle delivery order creation for courier dispatch automation, access real-time tracking for delivery progress automation, retrieve driver location for ETA calculation automation, manage delivery cancellation for order reversal automation, handle proof of delivery for completion verification automation, access fleet management for vehicle type selection automation, retrieve webhook for delivery event automation, manage batch order for bulk delivery automation, and integrate Lalamove with e-commerce, restaurant, and enterprise logistics for end-to-end Asian on-demand delivery automation.
use_cases: Booking on-demand motorcycle or van delivery for same-day e-commerce fulfillment automation agents
Requesting real-time delivery quotes for dynamic shipping cost calculation automation agents
Tracking driver location and delivery ETA for customer communication automation agents
Managing batch delivery orders for multi-drop logistics route optimization automation agents
not_for: International cross-border shipping (Lalamove is city/country-level on-demand delivery, not international freight)
Consumer peer-to-peer courier (Lalamove is B2B on-demand delivery for businesses)
Long-haul freight over 100km (Lalamove is local same-day delivery specialist)
best_when: A merchant, e-commerce platform, or enterprise business in Asia wanting AI agents to automate on-demand same-day delivery dispatch, real-time tracking, and fleet management through Lalamove's Asian courier network.
avoid_when: DRIVER AVAILABILITY IS DYNAMIC: Lalamove driver availability varies by time, location, and demand; automated guaranteed same-day delivery assumption creates no_driver_available error; automated must handle driver unavailability gracefully with retry or fallback. PRICE IS BASED ON REAL-TIME QUOTE: Lalamove delivery prices are dynamically quoted and can change between quote and booking; automated fixed-price assumption creates price mismatch at booking; automated must quote fresh price at booking time. CITY-SPECIFIC VEHICLE TYPES: Available vehicle types (motorcycle, car, van, truck) vary by city; automated vehicle type request without city check creates unavailable_vehicle error; automated must query supported vehicles per city before order. RECIPIENT MUST BE CONTACTABLE: Lalamove deliveries require recipient contact number for driver coordination; automated delivery without recipient contact creates delivery failure.

auth.notes: Lalamove uses API key + HMAC-SHA256 signature for authentication. REST API with JSON. Hong Kong HQ. Founded 2013 by Chow Shing-Yuk. Backed by Sequoia, Shunwei, RPS Ventures ($1.5B+ raised, unicorn 2021). Products: On-demand delivery (motorcycle, car, van, truck), same-day, scheduled, multi-stop, batch. SDKs: Node.js, PHP, Python, Java, Go. Cities: 390+ in HK, TW, SG, MY, TH, PH, VN, ID, IN, CN. 5M+ enterprise clients. Competes with Borzo and Pandago for Asian B2B on-demand delivery.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered business accounts; production charges per delivery
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-delivery pricing based on distance, vehicle type, and market; no monthly fee for basic usage; enterprise volume contracts available
pricing.notes: Hong Kong HK. Sequoia backed. Per-delivery pricing. 390+ Asian cities. B2B logistics focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order and quote APIs throttled; webhooks for delivery lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: FRESH QUOTE REQUIRED BEFORE BOOKING: Lalamove delivery prices are dynamically calculated; automated cached quote assumption creates price_changed error at booking; automated must call quotation endpoint immediately before order placement to get current price

DRIVER AVAILABILITY IS NOT GUARANTEED: Lalamove cannot guarantee driver availability at all times; automated fulfilled-instantly assumption creates no_available_driver response; automated must implement retry logic and fallback when no drivers available

HMAC SIGNATURE REQUIRED: Lalamove API requests require HMAC-SHA256 signature with timestamp; automated unsigned request creates authentication failure; automated must compute and include X-LLM-Signature header with each request

CITY CODE REQUIRED FOR VEHICLE TYPES: Available vehicle types differ by city; automated vehicle type request without valid city code creates invalid_service_type error; automated must specify correct city code and query available service types per city

MULTI-STOP ORDERS HAVE WAYPOINT LIMITS: Lalamove multi-stop delivery has maximum waypoints per order (typically 10-20 depending on market); automated unlimited stops assumption creates waypoints_exceed_limit error; automated must batch large multi-drop orders
agent_readiness.security_notes: On-demand logistics. PDPA, PCI-DSS. API key + HMAC. HK/SEA/Asia. Delivery and location data.

security_score_components.security_notes: On-demand delivery. PDPA, PCI-DSS. API key+HMAC. HK/Asia. Delivery and location data.
